title: Garlic Basil White Fish Bowl
description: A garlicky and velvety Tunisian-inspired dish featuring white fish in a creamy sauce with pickled vegetables, perfect for a crowd-pleaser appetizer or light meal.
instructions: Peel garlic cloves and mince them finely.
Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add salt, pepper, and vegetable stock to the pan, stir well to combine, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 5 minutes.
Fold in cream cheese until fully melted and smooth. Stir in pickled vegetables and basil leaves. Simmer gently for another 2-3 minutes.
Garnish with red onion slices if using. Serve hot as a topping over sliced fish fillets, garnished with fresh herbs.
